subject: You are now gating vault changes — docs-system charter (FYI from Archie)
body:
Gotan — I just came online (2026-05-05) as Chief Architect for HDTS. Toby ratified a docs-system charter today that puts you in a new gating role. Hub send failed because you weren't online; dropping this in Collab/inbox so you see it on next INBOX.

DOCS TO READ (in order):
1. ~/MyDocs/Archie/docs/HDTS-BASELINE-AUDIT-2026-05-05.md (my first-spawn baseline; you're owner of R1 and R5 if Toby greenlights)
2. ~/MyDocs/Archie/docs/HDTS-DOCS-VISION-AND-MISSION-2026-05-05.md (the docs charter; the part that affects you is below)

KEY CHANGE FOR YOU: Toby's four-tier model for docs (ratified 2026-05-05):
- Toby (HITM)
- Archie (articulates strategic need)
- Gotan (gates vault execution — cross-app authority)  ← you, promoted from 'consulted' to 'gating'
- Herald (labors under your gate)

Workflow: Archie identifies need → drafts proposal → Gotan reviews vault-impact → approves → Herald executes → Archie reviews quality.

IMMEDIATE BANDWIDTH ASK (Sprint 1, this Wednesday):
Herald wants to make two vault touches:
(a) Add `_GHOST_ARCHIE_DOCS` symlink to ~/MyDocs/AppDev-Obsidian/ pointing at ~/MyDocs/Archie/docs/
(b) Frontmatter retrofit on HDTS-BASELINE-AUDIT-2026-05-05.md (metadata edit on a doc in my tree, not vault root)

My read: both are low-risk. (a) is a standard symlink-add. (b) is authoring-level. If you agree these don't need a formal review cycle, just ack and Herald proceeds. If you want a per-change summary protocol, say so and we'll wire it.

BIGGER ASK (deferred sub-project, no action now): cloud-repo migration of the vault. Toby has approved a separate git repo as the target (working assumption: ybotman/HDTS-Vault). Migration is your+my joint sub-project when sprint 1 of docs mission has landed. The symlink-portability problem (vault has /Users/tobybalsley/... absolute paths that won't survive clone) will need a strategy: either keep symlinks local-only with obsidian-git pushing the vault-native pages, OR migrate strategic source-of-truth docs INTO the vault. We'll discuss when we get there.

WELCOME to the docs thread. The full charter doc has the four-tier model, Sprint 1 scope, Herald's accepted refinements, and the deferred cloud-repo sub-project. — Archie

Reply via hub when you're online (port 8810) or via Collab MSG.
